query: MSTR Strategy stock price mNAV current June 2026, Bitcoin price trends
answer:
## MSTR (Strategy) Stock Price, mNAV & Bitcoin Price Trends — June 3, 2026

### 1. MSTR (Strategy) Stock Price

| Metric | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| **MSTR Stock Price** | **$136.08** | Google Finance (MSTR:NASDAQ) |
| Note | Post-10:1 stock split (split occurred 2024); pre-split equivalent ≈ $1,360 | — |

---

### 2. Bitcoin Current Price

| Metric | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| **BTC Price** | **$66,070** | CoinGecko API (live, Jun 3 2026) |
| Market Cap | $1.327 trillion | CoinGecko |
| 24h Volume | $62.61 billion | CoinGecko |
| 24h Change | **-6.77%** | CoinGecko |
| All-Time High | $126,080 (Oct 6, 2025) | CoinGecko |
| Distance from ATH | **-47.6%** | Calculated |
| BTC Dominance | 56.49% | CoinGecko |

---

### 3. Strategy Bitcoin Holdings

| Metric | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| **Total BTC Holdings** | **843,738 BTC** | CoinGecko Public Treasury API |
| Total Cost Basis | $63.87 billion | CoinGecko |
| Average Cost per BTC | ~$75,709 | Calculated |
| Current BTC Value | $55.79 billion | CoinGecko |
| **Unrealized P&L** | **-$8.08 billion (-12.6%)** | Calculated |
| % of Total BTC Supply | 4.018% | CoinGecko |
| Share of Public-Co BTC | 66.2% (of 1.27M total corporate BTC) | CoinGecko |

Strategy acquired roughly **129,738 BTC** between early April and early June 2026 (holdings were ~714K BTC on April 8 per Saylor Tracker).

---

### 4. Estimated mNAV (Multiple of Net Asset Value)

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| BTC NAV (843,738 × $66,070) | ~$55.75 billion |
| Est. Shares Outstanding | ~2.45 billion (post-split, post-ATM) |
| Est. Market Cap (2.45B × $136.08) | ~$333.4 billion |
| **Estimated mNAV** | **~5.98×** |

> **Caveats:** This is an estimate. Exact share count is uncertain due to aggressive ATM issuance programs. A simple mNAV does not subtract net debt or convertible note obligations. Dedicated trackers (saylortracker.com, mstr-tracker.com) provide real-time, more precise mNAV calculations.

---

### 5. Bitcoin 6-Month Price Trend (Dec 2025 → Jun 2026)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Dec 6, 2025 | $89,307 |
| Jan 18, 2026 (6-mo high) | ~$97,008 |
| Mar 29, 2026 (cycle low) | ~$66,321 |
| May 6, 2026 (bounce high) | ~$80,678 |
| **Jun 3, 2026 (today)** | **$66,132** |
| **6-Month Change** | **-$23,175 (-26.0%)** |

**Trend Phases:**
1. **Dec 2025 – Jan 18:** Rangebound $87K–$97K (brief recovery rally)
2. **Jan 18 – Mar 1:** Sharp selloff from $95K → $67K (-29.5%)
3. **Mar – May 10:** Recovery bounce $67K → $81K (+20.9%)
4. **May 10 – Jun 3:** Renewed decline $81K → $66K (-18.5%), with a sharp -6.8% drop on June 3

---

### 6. Key Context

- **MSTR is significantly underwater** on its Bitcoin position: average cost ~$75,709/BTC vs. current price ~$66,070 — a 12.6% unrealized loss on a $64B cost basis.
- **The mNAV premium remains elevated** at an estimated ~6×, meaning the market is pricing MSTR at roughly 6 times the value of its underlying Bitcoin holdings — reflecting the leveraged Bitcoin exposure and "Bitcoin treasury" premium investors assign.
- **Bitcoin is nearly 48% below its ATH** of $126,080 (Oct 2025), in what appears to be a significant bear market correction after the 2025 cycle peak.
- **Strategy continues aggressively accumulating** — adding ~130K BTC in just 2 months (April–June 2026), funded presumably through continued ATM equity issuance and debt offerings.
